_comment: Wires option B's green gate. image_build.cmd rebases each candidate's vibeic branch onto its new upstream release, bumps the vibeic-eda Dockerfile ARG, docker-builds the image, and smoke-regresses it. GK_MODE=verify (default, staged) proves the build without touching production; set GK_MODE=promote to auto ff-branch + push image on green. Owner staged rollout: verify green first, then flip to promote.
